channel.title: Yahoo Finance on Jared Szajkowski
channel.description: Recent content in Yahoo Finance on Jared Szajkowski

item.title: Leveraged ETF Return Dispersion
item.description: How do the long-term returns of leveraged ETFs diverge from their underlying index?

item.title: Performance Of Various Asset Classes During Fed Policy Cycles
item.description: How does the performance of stocks, bonds, and other asset classes vary during Fed policy cycles?

item.title: Investigating A VIX Trading Signal, Part 3: Trading
item.description: A brief look at finding a trading signal based on moving averages of the VIX.

item.title: Investigating A VIX Trading Signal, Part 2: Finding A Signal
item.description: A brief look at finding a trading signal based on moving averages of the VIX.

item.title: Investigating A VIX Trading Signal, Part 1: VIX And VVIX
item.description: A brief look at finding a trading signal based on moving averages of the VIX.

item.title: Reusable And Extensible Python Functions For Financial Data Analysis
item.description: A list of common functions used for data acquisition, cleaning, analysis, etc.
